evals.name: bootstrap
evals.prompt: Set up foo for this project.

evals.name: add-observation
evals.prompt: I've noticed the agent keeps forgetting to run tests after making changes. Can you track that?

evals.name: routing-project-decision
evals.prompt: We decided to always use UTC for timestamps.

evals.name: create-discipline
evals.prompt: We always do a consistency pass after renames, then update NOTES.md, then check for stale references. Can you make that a discipline?

evals.name: promote
evals.prompt: FOO_1 has been validated — promote it to a CLAUDE.md directive.

evals.name: told-about-pattern
evals.prompt: You just forgot to update NOTES.md again after that decision. This is the third time this session.

evals.name: escalation-recurring
evals.prompt: FOO_2 keeps coming back even after we resolved it last session. The fix didn't stick.

evals.name: show-state
evals.prompt: What process observations do we have open?
